Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)

- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input

Navigation (nav.tsx):
- Two-tier header: 4px navy accent bar + white header band (logo + user) + navy nav bar (links)
- Mobile: single navy band with logo + hamburger
- Rectangular active tab style (bg-white/20) instead of border-bottom
- rounded buttons instead of rounded-full

Layout (layout.tsx):
- Removed bg-primary-15 from body
- Increased content padding (pt-8 sm:pt-10)
- Footer: bg-primary-dark text-white with border-t-4 border-primary accent

All components & pages:
- Cards: rounded-lg border-border bg-white (no shadow, no bg-white/95)
- Buttons: rounded not rounded-xl/rounded-full, active:translate-y-px for tactile press
- Inputs: border-2 border-border, focus: border-primary shadow-[0_0_0_1px]

- Breadcrumbs on subpages (voorbereiden, briefings, settings, instructies, dashboard)

- All bg-primary-15 callouts → bg-surface-muted
- All text-primary-75 → text-text-secondary or text-text-muted

commit.message:
Fix P0 bugs: multiturn double system prompt + logit lens layer indexing

P0-1/P0-2: Multiturn Turn 3 used apply_chat_template which injected a
second system prompt and was missing <|im_end|> between Turn 2 forced
answer and Turn 3. Fixed by manual ChatML construction.

P0-3: Logit lens hidden_states[0] is the embedding layer, not transformer
layer 0. Added transformer_layer field (None for embedding, 0-63 for
transformer layers) to avoid off-by-one vs Pearson-Vogel et al.

Session 94: Unified knowledge index builder + search wiring

3-pass builder reads ALL system documents into instant in-memory index:
- Pass 0: Python modules (311 ordinance, 36 agents law, 80 discount codes, etc.)
- Pass 1: Firestore (11,753 tariff, 94 chapter_notes, 218 directives, 6,121 FIO)
- Pass 2: Hebrew<->English synonyms (רחפן<->drone, צמיג<->tire, etc.)

broker_engine.py: unified index FIRST, pre_classify() FALLBACK for both
_smart_tariff_search() and _drill_to_subheading().

Fixes root cause of 0 candidates for Hebrew product names like "רחפנים"
where keyword_index miss + English-only tariff descriptions = total miss.

2,370 tests (31 new), zero regressions.

commit.message:
fix(docker): cleanup per-run bridge networks, fix stroppy OTel config

- Add RemoveNetwork to containers pkg to disconnect containers and remove Docker bridge
- Call cleanupDockerRunNetwork from both destroy-plan and on-failure handler to
  prevent "Pool overlaps" errors on subsequent runs
- Fix stroppy env merge order: defaults < user stroppy_env < forced (DRIVER_URL, K6_OUT, K6_TAGS)
- Remove --output/--tag CLI args from runCmd; use K6_OUT=opentelemetry env var instead
  (stroppy v2.0.0 RangeArgs(1,2) rejects extra positional args)
- Fix K6_TAGS format: use key:value,key:value (envconfig map syntax, not key=value)
- Fix K6_OTEL_HTTP_EXPORTER_ENDPOINT: host:port only, no http:// scheme
- Increase max_connections to 200 to handle 99 VUs in docker-local-test.yaml
- Add examples/docker-local-test.yaml smoke test for local Docker target

Reorganize KPI sheet: clean layout + cell-anchored charts

Problems fixed:
- Charts were positioned with pixel offsets (top/left) which Excel
  frequently resets, causing all 5 charts to stack on top of each other
- Data was scattered across columns A-B, D-E, and G-H making the sheet
  hard to read
- Verbose chart descriptions took 24 rows and many formatting API calls

New layout:
- All data tables stacked vertically in columns A-B with section headers
- Charts use setPosition(startCell, endCell) to anchor to specific cells
  so they stay locked in place on scroll, resize, and recalculation
- 2x2 grid (D2:J16, L2:R16, D18:J32, L18:R32) plus full-width bottom
  chart (D34:R49) for Top Variance SKUs
- Net reduction of ~50 lines and fewer API calls

CAL-001 Phase 3: Edge cases, property tests, bounds exhaustive, P2 golden files

Adversarial testing to harden the statistical engine:
- test_stats_edge.py: 46 edge case tests (empty data, NaN, inf, constant values,
  wrong columns) — documents 8 known bugs as graceful error returns
- test_stats_properties.py: 10 hypothesis property-based tests verifying statistical
  invariants (p in [0,1], r in [-1,1], R² in [0,1], CI ordering, symmetry)
- test_bounds_exhaustive.py: 62 tests covering every Tier 1/2 analysis with
  minimal valid data — no crashes
- 9 Priority 2 golden files: spearman, mood_median, tukey_hsd, friedman,
  regression_ml, classification, clustering, pca, tolerance_stackup
- Golden file test runner: bracket indexing, _contains assertions, boolean support
- Fix tolerance_stackup calibration config: components → dimensions

305 tests pass. 55 golden files total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix JSON round-trip densification with valueEquals and toDeepStorableValue (#2997)

* fix: replace raw JSON round-trip with encoding-aware path in cache.ts and consumer.ts

Provider.send() in cache.ts used JSON.stringify/JSON.parse to normalize
values before asserting facts. This was correct when undefined was not
storable, but now destroys undefined values and sparse array holes that
the rich storable path preserves.

Replace with jsonFromValue/valueFromJson from the encoding dispatch
layer, following the same pattern used in PR #2971 for space.ts. When
unifiedJsonEncoding is OFF, behavior is unchanged (dispatch falls
through to plain JSON). When ON, the encoding-aware path preserves
undefined and sparse arrays.

Also fix the same JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(...)) pattern in
consumer.ts ConsumerInvocation constructor.

Co-Authored-By: coder-colt (Claude Opus 4.6) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Use toDeepStorableValue() for consumer invocation deep-clone

Replace the jsonFromValue/valueFromJson round-trip in ConsumerInvocation
with toDeepStorableValue(), which was purpose-built as the proper
replacement for JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(...)). This is stricter: it
rejects non-finite numbers (NaN, Infinity) instead of silently coercing
them to null. Update the cell-static-methods test to use finite special
numbers instead of NaN/Infinity, which were always lossily corrupted.

Clean up now-unused imports: jsonFromValue, valueFromJson,
ReconstructionContext, StorableValue, and the consumerReconstructionContext
stub.

Co-Authored-By: coder-cedar (Claude Opus 4.6) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add valueEquals() and use it in cache.ts Provider.send()

Add valueEquals(a, b) to storable-value.ts: flag OFF uses JSON.stringify
comparison (matching original behavior), flag ON uses deep structural
equality from utils/deep-equal.

Rewire Provider.send() in cache.ts to use valueEquals() for the change-
detection check and toDeepStorableValue() for the stored value, replacing
the jsonFromValue/valueFromJson round-trip. Remove now-unused imports and
the storageReconstructionContext stub.

Co-Authored-By: coder-cedar (Claude Opus 4.6) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Rename valueEquals to valueEqual

Convention: equal() for two-argument functions, equals() for instance methods.

Co-Authored-By: upstream-liaison-bolt (Claude Opus 4.6) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Move toDeepStorableValue to construction, use deepEqual for comparison

Normalize newValue at construction time so the comparison and assertion
both use the same already-normalized value. Replace valueEqual() with
deepEqual() since the values are now in canonical storable form.

Co-Authored-By: upstream-liaison-bolt (Claude Opus 4.6) <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use GWT m_p everywhere: neutrinos, PMNS wrapping, papers, website

All neutrino calculations now use m_p = 6*pi^5*m_e (GWT predicted)
instead of observed 938.272 MeV. Updates Dm2_31 from +0.2% to -2.3%,
Dm2_21 from +0.1% to -2.4%. PMNS wrapping factor 1.237->1.242.
Papers regenerated from .md source via md_to_tex.py.

Fix USP section overlapping About section header

commit.message:
feat: redesign @coji/durably-react — createDurably, fullstack-first, automated doc checks (#82)

* feat: redesign @coji/durably-react API — fullstack-first, new import paths

- Root import (`@coji/durably-react`) now exports fullstack hooks (was SPA)
- SPA hooks moved to `@coji/durably-react/spa` subpath
- Rename `createDurablyClient` → `createDurablyHooks`
- Add `jobs` option to `createDurably()` for 1-step initialization
- Rename example dirs: `browser-*` → `spa-*` to match mode names
- Update all documentation, guides, examples, and skills
- Fix DurablyProvider to accept `Durably<any, any>` (was too restrictive)

Closes #81

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: deduplicate JobHooks, cache proxy results, guard Symbol keys

- Remove duplicate JobHooks interface from create-durably-hooks.ts,
  import from create-job-hooks.ts instead
- Delegate proxy handler to createJobHooks() instead of re-implementing
- Cache job hooks per jobKey to avoid allocations on every property access
- Guard proxy get trap against Symbol keys (React DevTools compatibility)
- Fix incorrect import path in docstring (@coji/durably-react/fullstack
  → @coji/durably-react)
- Remove unnecessary SingleJobHooks alias from index.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: stale closure in triggerAndWait, parallelize autoResume, deduplicate subscribe

- Fix triggerAndWait stale closure bug: use ref to track latest
  subscription state instead of capturing React state in closure
- Parallelize autoResume fetches: running and pending status checks
  now run concurrently with Promise.all (halves latency)
- Deduplicate subscribe() event listeners: replace 11 near-identical
  blocks with data-driven loop over event types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove backward compat aliases, fix triggerAndWait leak, update docs

- Remove deprecated createDurablyClient/DurablyClient/JobClient aliases
- Fix triggerAndWait interval leak on unmount via waitIntervalRef
- Rename test file to match source (create-durably-hooks.test.tsx)
- Add jobs option to create-durably.md signature and options table
- Fix SPA trigger example with incorrect labels parameter in llms.md
- Add UseRunsClientOptions (realtime option) to fullstack useRuns docs
- Fix stale "Browser-Complete/Server-Connected" terminology in types.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: rename createDurablyHooks → createDurably, add built-in useRuns/useRunActions

- Rename `createDurablyHooks` to `createDurably` (mirrors server-side name, tRPC-inspired)
- Add `useRuns` and `useRunActions` as built-in cross-job methods on DurablyClient Proxy
- Add `ExtractJobs<T>` type to support `createDurably<typeof serverDurably>()`
- Convert fullstack example to use `createDurably` pattern throughout
- Rename website docs: browser.md → spa.md, client.md → fullstack.md
- Use framework-agnostic `durably.ts` in doc examples
- Regenerate llms.txt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: rename durably.hooks.ts → durably.ts in fullstack example

Match the framework-agnostic file name used in documentation.
The `.hooks.ts` suffix was unnecessary — only `.client.ts` triggers
React Router's client-only behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: full website update — init(), jobs option, createDurably patterns

- Use `jobs: {}` option instead of `.register()` chain in all guides
- Use `await durably.init()` instead of `migrate()` + `start()`
- Rewrite fullstack.md: createDurably section first with per-job
  and cross-job hook examples (durably.useRuns(), durably.useRunActions())
- Update spa.md: jobs option, init()
- Update index.md: Dashboard example uses durably.useRuns()
- Update sidebar: "CSV Import (Fullstack)", "Offline App (SPA)"
- Update concepts.md, background-sync.md to use jobs option

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: reorder sidebar — Fullstack before SPA

Fullstack is the primary use case; SPA (OPFS) is specialized.
Reorder both Guide and API sidebars accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add missing sidebar entries — Auth Middleware, deleteRun, subscribe

Important sections that existed in page content but were missing
from sidebar navigation:
- HTTP Handler: Auth Middleware (replaces generic "Security")
- createDurably: deleteRun, subscribe

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update core llms.md — use jobs option in browser example

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update core README — use jobs option instead of .register()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: overhaul doc-check and release-check skills

Key improvements:
- Add "grep for old patterns" as Step 2 (most effective at catching stale docs)
- Add missing file tiers: README (root), CLAUDE.md, skills, sidebar config
- Add API pattern consistency table (jobs option, init(), createDurably)
- Add "final grep" step to confirm nothing was missed
- Reorganize release-check into sequential workflow (diff → grep → check → validate → grep)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: overhaul skills with orchestrator pattern and automated detection

Inspired by Anthropic's skill-creator design patterns:

- Add `scripts/find-stale.sh` — automated grep for old API patterns,
  import paths, directory names, and terminology across docs/examples
- Rewrite doc-check as 6-phase orchestrator: detect → understand →
  walk docs → regenerate → validate → final check
- Rewrite release-check as 10-phase orchestrator sharing the same script
- Why-driven: every Tier/file explains WHY it needs checking
- Description optimized for trigger accuracy ("prevents follow-up PRs")
- Fix "Browser mode" → "SPA mode" in durably-react README (caught by script)

commit.message:
Fix ARM64 kernel decompression: use zlib instead of gzip module (#84)

Both gzip.decompress and gzip.GzipFile try to read concatenated gzip
members and fail on trailing non-gzip data in the EFI stub.
zlib.decompressobj decompresses a single stream and stops, storing
remaining data in unused_data without error.

Co-authored-by: elyxlz <elyxlz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: auto-discover and load Claude Code plugins

Add automatic plugin discovery from ~/.claude/plugins/cache/
to enable all installed plugin skills in the Feishu bridge.

Changes:
- Add discoverPlugins() function to scan enabledPlugins
- Automatically load plugins via SDK plugins option
- Support all 6 installed plugins:
  - superpowers (14 skills)
  - planning-with-files
  - agent-skill-creator-plugin
  - gpt-image (2 skills)
  - excalidraw-diagram
  - code-simplifier

Now users can access all 44+ skills from their Claude Code
installation directly in Feishu without manual configuration.

Plugin discovery:
1. Read ~/.claude/settings.json for enabledPlugins
2. Scan ~/.claude/plugins/cache/{marketplace}/{plugin}/{version}
3. Pass plugin paths to SDK via plugins option
4. Skills automatically registered as /plugin-name:skill-name

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Simplify dapp migration to add-only (no icon update)

Reverts the icon-correction logic added in the previous commit,
keeping the migration as a simple add-only pass for missing dapps.
Existing configs with the old 🏜️ icon will continue to display it;
new installs and freshly added entries use 🌵.

commit.message:
HomeOverlay hero: button padding, text selection, animation gate, letter spacing

- Replace fixed height/width on CTA button with uniform padding: 18px all sides
- Disable text selection on hero h2 (select-none) to prevent mobile copy callout
- Gate button pointer-events until fade-in animation completes (2400ms) on both desktop and mobile
- Increase hero letter-spacing from 0.01em to 0.05em for improved readability at all sizes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add deep research page at /brand

Self-contained HTML page presenting competitive analysis, market data,
positioning strategy, and financial model for freelance practice.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

test: add vitest + 40 regression tests for createSystemCalls

Prevents fire-and-forget regression where system calls returned
success without awaiting the transaction receipt. Covers receipt
status checking, ownership validation across both auth paths
(direct wallet + EIP-7702 delegator), and error handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix cashflow section toggle - use full re-render instead of DOM manipulation

Previous approach manually toggled row visibility which failed when rows
weren't in the DOM (e.g. "none in range" case). Now toggles the state
and calls renderCashflow() for a reliable full re-render.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
